value.data: ={{ JSON.stringify({ direction: $json.direction, caller: $json.caller, dialed: $json.dialed, agent_id: $json.agent_id, duration_sec: $json.duration_sec, transcript: $json.transcript, lead: $json.lead, received_at: $json.received_at }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, logged: true, intent_score: $('Parse Extraction').first().json.lead.intent_score, alerted: $('Parse Extraction').first().json.lead.intent_score >= 7 }) }}
